Website Design Report 2024

Case Study — Healthcare · WordPress

Modern Physiotherapy
& Rehabilitation
Clinic, Hyderabad

A full website design project — from competitor research and site architecture to content creation, development, and launch on WordPress using the Divi theme builder.

WordPress + Divi
4 Weeks
6 Pages
Hyderabad, India
Scroll to explore

01 — Planning & Research

Week 1 & 2

Setup &
Infrastructure
  • Purchased domain name and web hosting from GoDaddy.com
  • Installed WordPress
  • Purchased and downloaded Divi from Elegant Themes
Research &
Planning
  • Conducted competitor research across 5 clinics
  • Prepared list of information required from the client
  • Framed the structure of the website
  • Defined structure of each page — Home, About Us, Physiotherapy, Contact Us

02 — Competitor Research

Clinics analysed

Researched the following competitors to understand industry standards, content structure, and UX patterns before beginning the design.

Gaman Rehabilitation
Ucchvas
Jaya Physio Clinics
Angel Physio Rehab
KIMS Hospital

03 — Client Briefing

Information requested
from the client

Before beginning content creation, a detailed document was prepared and sent to the client listing all the information and assets needed to build the website.

Facilities — online consultancy, 24/7 physiotherapy services
Number of patients treated (estimation)
Awards, recognitions, and certificates
Real images for gallery
Videos of treatments
Patient before and after treatment pictures
Team details — doctor name, image, specialisation, degree
Logo file
Mission, vision, and values
Official email ID

04 — Architecture

Structure of the website

The site was planned with a clean 3-click navigation model. Every key destination is reachable within three clicks from the homepage.

Home
About Us
Physiotherapy
Contact Us
Terms & Conditions
Privacy Policy
Navigation Principle

The 3-clicks model was followed throughout. The logo directs users to the homepage. About Us is accessible from the homepage. Physiotherapy leads to all treatment pages. Contact Us is where appointments are booked.

05 — Wireframe to Live

From sketch to screen

Each page was first hand-sketched to map out the layout and section flow before any development began. Below is the homepage wireframe alongside the final live result.

Hand-drawn wireframe
Live website — homepage

07 — Development

Week 2 & 3

Content &
Design
  • Content creation for all pages of the website
  • Proofreading all written content
  • Sourced and placed all images
  • Decided font size and style
  • Designed the header and navigation
  • Created a global footer used across all pages
  • Built and submitted sitemap
  • Created all pages and set up URL structure

08 — Final Build

Week 3 & 4 — Launch

All pages designed, every button linked, contact form tested and working. Mobile optimisation completed across all pages before going live.

01Classic EditorWordPress content editing
02WP Fastest CacheSite performance & speed
03Yoast SEOOn-page SEO optimisation

09 — Live Result

The finished website

Homepage — Hero section with treatment sidebar navigation
Footer — Quick links, contact details, social media, and brand information
Live Website

The website was fully built, tested, and launched. Mobile optimisation was completed across all pages before going live.
